response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-adjacent tools, plus strong architectural and DevOps exposure, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles for over a decade) far exceeds the junior/mid-level requirement, and his German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site presence in Berlin being required.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack and DevOps skills with Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK
Strong track record in clean architecture, testing, and knowledge sharing
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior/staff experience for entry-level role
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
Extensive background in DLang and embedded systems may indicate misalignment with renewable energy domain focus
